title: Vintage Comic Book Analysis Schema
description: Schema for deep extraction of vintage comic book metadata by the Expert agent.

publisher.description: e.g., Marvel, DC, Image, Dark Horse

title.description: The exact title of the series (e.g., 'The Amazing Spider-Man', 'X-Men')

issue_number.description: The issue number, including decimals if applicable (e.g., '1', '1.5', '300')

publication_year.description: The year of publication, derived from the cover date or copyright text.

publication_month.description: The month of publication if visible.

variant_cover.description: True if this appears to be a special variant cover (e.g., holofoil, chromium, specific artist variant).

key_issue_indicators.description: List of significant events advertised on the cover (e.g., '1st appearance of Venom', 'Death of Superman', 'Anniversary Issue').

creators_listed.description: List of writers, pencillers, or inkers prominently displayed on the cover (e.g., 'Todd McFarlane', 'Jim Lee').

spine_ticks.description: Observations of color breaks or stress lines along the spine.

corner_wear.description: Observations of blunting or rounding on the corners.

creases.description: Any visible folds or creases on the cover.

overall_grade_estimate.description: A very rough estimated grade range based purely on the visible cover image (e.g., 'NM 9.4+', 'VF/NM 9.0', 'VG 4.0').

condition_notes.description: Detailed observations about the physical condition of the comic based ONLY on the provided image.

confidence_score.description: The AI's confidence in its extraction, from 0 to 1.
